name: Astron Paper & Board Mill Limited
summary: Astron Paper & Board Mill Limited manufactures and sells a range of kraft papers from waste paper for packaging industry in India. The company offers high ring crust test papers, kraft liners, liners, and corrugated medium papers for use in the manufacture of corrugated boxes and liners, corrugated sacks, and composite containers. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Ahmedabad, India.
